_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin deficiency predicts FAK inhibitor sensitivity: a synthetic lethal relationship.

_contextSnippet: Statistical analysis was performed using Prism 6 (GraphPad Software). Unpaired t-tests, one-way ANOVA with Tukey's multiple comparisons test, and two-way ANOVA with Bonferroni's multiple comparisons test were used
details: Used for statistical analysis including unpaired t-tests, one-way ANOVA with Tukey's multiple comparisons test, and two-way ANOVA with Bonferroni's multiple comparisons test
